summary: Tested P0 bug fixes for v42.0.0: 1) Party label deduplication using _make_party_label helper - PASS, 2) Payment Undo button visibility in History dialog - PASS. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Undo+History button visible in main table, Undo buttons visible inside Payment History dialog.
critical_code_review_comments: PrivateTrading.jsx is NOT imported anywhere in the app - it appears to be an orphan/unused file. The actual component used is PaddyPurchase.jsx in Vouchers section.
_make_party_label helper correctly avoids duplicate party names like 'Kridha (Kesinga) - Kesinga' by checking if mandi is already in party name
seed_data_creation: Test entries created with TEST_ prefix for party label deduplication tests - auto-cleaned after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: v42.0.0 bug fixes verified: 1) _make_party_label helper in private_trading.py (line 23-31) correctly builds party labels without duplication. 2) Payment Undo buttons visible in PaddyPurchase.jsx History dialog (line 549-562). 3) Orange Undo+History combined button shows in main table for entries with paid_amount > 0 (line 328-329). 4) Auto-fix endpoint at POST /api/cash-book/auto-fix includes step 6 for duplicate party name merge. NOTE: PrivateTrading.jsx is NOT used - PaddyPurchase.jsx is the active component under Vouchers tab.

party_label_deduplication.details: Creating 'TestParty (LocalMandi)' with mandi 'LocalMandi' creates ledger entries with category 'TestParty (LocalMandi)' NOT 'TestParty (LocalMandi) - LocalMandi'

payment_consistent_category.details: Making payment on entry keeps consistent category names in cashbook ledger

mark_paid_consistent_category.details: Mark Paid keeps consistent category names

auto_fix_duplicate_merge.details: POST /api/cash-book/auto-fix endpoint works and includes duplicate party name merge logic

payment_history_undo_buttons.details: Payment History dialog shows Undo buttons (red Undo2 icon) for each payment - verified with data-testid='paddy-undo-pay-{id}'

undo_payment_deletes_and_updates.details: Clicking Undo on a payment deletes the payment and updates paid_amount back to 0

main_table_undo_history_icon.details: Main table shows orange Undo+History icon (Undo2+History) for entries with paid_amount > 0 - verified with data-testid='paddy-undo-history-{id}'

code_review_notes.private_trading_py: _make_party_label helper at line 23-31 correctly handles party label creation
code_review_notes.cashbook_py: auto-fix endpoint at line 946-1095 includes step 6 for duplicate party name merge (lines 1073-1092)
code_review_notes.PaddyPurchase_jsx: Lines 324-329 for main table Undo buttons, Lines 549-562 for History dialog Undo buttons
code_review_notes.PrivateTrading_jsx: NOT USED - orphan file, same pattern exists but component is not imported anywhere
